footer.aboutText: Active Soft is a leading provider of technology solutions, specializing in Oracle ERP systems and custom software development to empower businesses.

hero.title: Empowering Your Business with Innovative Technology
hero.subtitle: We deliver cutting-edge ERP solutions, managed IT services, and custom software to help you achieve your goals.

services.title: Our Core Solutions
services.subtitle: Providing comprehensive services to meet the demands of modern business.

features.erpDesc: Streamline your operations with our expert Oracle ERP implementation and support.
features.itSupportDesc: Reliable, proactive managed IT services to keep your systems running smoothly 24/7.
features.customAppsDesc: Bespoke desktop and web applications tailored to your unique business needs and workflows.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Business?
cta.subtitle: Let's discuss how our solutions can help you achieve your strategic objectives. Get a free consultation today.

impact.title: Our Impact in Numbers

workStages.title: Work Stages
workStages.slogan: Smart planning is one of the most important factors of distinction and success
stages: Initial planning of the complete project vision
Reviewing this vision with the client and making necessary adjustments
Implementation phase (duration varies based on project size)
Delivering the final project structure, reviewing it with the client, and applying finishing touches

services.title: Our Comprehensive Services
services.subtitle: Tailored technology solutions to drive your business forward.
services.smartScaleDesc: Intelligent weighing system that automates weight recording and integrates directly with your inventory and financial systems.

smartScaleFeatures.feature1: Automatic recording of actual weight for products, pallets, or containers without human intervention
smartScaleFeatures.feature2: Prevention of manipulation or manual input errors
smartScaleFeatures.feature3: Comparison of actual weight with standard weight to detect deviations or losses
smartScaleFeatures.feature4: Direct generation of invoices and costs based on real weight
smartScaleFeatures.feature5: Instant updating of inventory and financial accounts with each weighing operation
smartScaleFeatures.feature6: Direct integration between electronic scales and packaging stations within system

hrPayroll.title: HR and Payroll Management System
hrPayroll.desc: An integrated and comprehensive system with financial accounts for managing employee affairs and payroll calculations.

features.feature1: Payroll management, deduction processing, and calculation of bonuses and incentives.
features.feature2: Based on variable settings for insurance, vacations, and taxes, adjustable when laws change.
features.feature3: Complies with all payroll calculation rules and penalty regulations.
features.feature4: Recording detailed employee data, updating files, grades, and job titles. The system stores employee photos and all employment documents, with reports on missing documents and tracking document expiration dates to notify employees for renewal.
features.feature5: Records who entered and modified data with a period transfer system to prevent tampering
features.feature6: Ability to reverse period transfers to modify data according to permissions

howItChangesWork.title: How will the system change the work mechanism within my facility?
howItChangesWork.point1: First, the system relies on integrated computing solutions that create harmonious performance between all departments and individuals within your facility.
howItChangesWork.point2: Second, it enables you to manage and execute all administrative processes and procedures you desire in a few steps, without the need to edit or review numerous documents as happens in traditional management methods.
howItChangesWork.point3: Third, it allows you to record all data related to employees and their movements through a single database; thus you won't worry about data loss or overlap for any technical or human reason.
howItChangesWork.point4: Fourth, it saves the time you spend conducting your operations; as it performs many tasks simultaneously; it doesn't only care about administrative operations related to your facility's employees, but also organizes and manages financial operations related to employee salaries and all their financial entitlements or deductions. Thus, your facility's employees working in the human resources department can focus on achieving the facility's goals.

services.erpDesc: Full-cycle Oracle ERP services including implementation, customization, migration, and support to optimize your business processes.
services.erpFeaturesDesc: Our ERP system is designed to provide comprehensive solutions for businesses of all sizes. Here are some of the key features it offers:

features.multiUser: Multiple user permissions with precise management
features.remoteAccess: Ability to work from anywhere via the Internet
features.autoBackup: Automatic backups created multiple times daily
features.auditTrail: Complete audit trail showing who added, modified, or deleted
features.employeeDocs: Entry of employee photos and documents
features.foreignCurrency: Foreign currency support with fixed or variable rates per transaction
features.multiCompany: Multiple companies or branches with consolidated reports
features.exchangeRate: Exchange rate determination for foreign currencies
features.notes: Notes entry for each journal entry item
features.cashierLink: Link each cashier to a specific employee
features.collectionPayment: Recording collection and payment operations with separate documents

services.itSupportDesc: Proactive 24/7 monitoring, helpdesk support, and IT infrastructure management to ensure your systems are always secure and efficient.
services.customAppsDesc: We design, develop, and deploy bespoke desktop and web applications that solve unique business challenges and integrate seamlessly with your existing systems.
services.securityDesc: Implementing bank-level security protocols to protect your data, applications, and network from evolving cyber threats.

concept.title: General Concept
points: Integrated accounting and administrative system for managing all commercial and industrial activities
Flexible and applicable to any type of company (commercial – service – industrial)

mainFeatures.title: Core Features
points: Management of more than one branch or company within the same system
Full integration between all departments (Sales – Inventory – Accounting)
Smart alerts for inventory, payments, and receivables
Real-time reports helping in decision making

generalAccounts.title: General Accounting
points: Automatic journal entries from all operations
Preparation of financial statements (Balance Sheet – Income Statement – Cash Flow)

salesCustomers.title: Sales and Customers
points: Periodic reports on representative and branch performance

inventoryWarehouses.title: Inventory and Warehouses
points: Support for barcode and different units of measurement

costManagement.title: Cost Management
points: Allocation of direct and indirect costs
Profitability analysis for each department or project

additionalFeatures.title: Additional Features
points: Customizable according to the nature of the activity
Works on more than one branch and activity
Easy and fast to use interface

costingModule.title: Costing Module
costingModule.subtitle: Comprehensive production cost management system with actual costing methodology
costingModule.methodologyDesc: The system is based on Actual Costing during the production month.
methodologyItems: Indirect industrial expenses (General service centers + Production services)
costingModule.bomTitle: Raw Materials and BOM (Bill of Materials)
costingModule.bomDesc1: Material ratios for each product are determined through BOM.
costingModule.bomDesc2: The system automatically issues raw material documents according to BOM ratios.
costingModule.bomDesc3: Variable materials are manually issued based on laboratory instructions.
costingModule.bomDesc4: When entering actual inventory at the end of the month:
bomItems: The system modifies automatic issue documents to accommodate inventory differences (increase/decrease).
Inventory differences are distributed to production orders.
costingModule.qualityDesc1: A portion of production is issued for inspection and loaded to Quality Inspection cost.
costingModule.qualityDesc2: Quantity can be returned for inspection or to the warehouse, resulting in automatic reduction of quality expense.
costingModule.directExpensesDesc: Recorded in one of two ways:
directExpensesItems: Daily entries loaded to production lines.
Or raw material issuance from warehouses to production lines.
costingModule.indirectExpensesDesc1: Recorded on General or Production service centers.
costingModule.indirectExpensesDesc2: Monthly distribution ratios are recorded showing the benefit of each production line from each service center.
costingModule.indirectExpensesDesc3: The system issues entries to load expenses from service centers to production lines.
costingModule.indirectExpensesDesc4: If part of the expenses remains unloaded, it appears in the Income Statement.
costingModule.costDistributionDesc1: Each production order is loaded with its share of expenses based on:
costDistributionItems: Or production quantity as an alternative when time is not recorded.
costingModule.costDistributionDesc3: Production quantity is weighted by product selling price to achieve fair distribution of industrial expenses.
costingModule.valuationDesc1: Product valuation is done at actual cost monthly.
costingModule.valuationDesc2: Valuation is fixed as an inventory addition document affecting Cost of Goods Sold (COGS).
costingModule.multiPeriodTitle: Production Orders Spanning Multiple Financial Periods
costingModule.multiPeriodDesc1: When a production order spans multiple periods:
multiPeriodItems: Cost is accumulated throughout the entire order duration.
If previous period costs are different, the system requests reopening periods to modify valuation.
costingModule.stagesDesc1: The system supports products requiring multiple production stages.
costingModule.stagesDesc2: Each stage cost is calculated separately.
costingModule.stagesDesc3: A stage's production is revalued as raw material for the next stage.
costingModule.stagesDesc4: The sequence continues until the final stage.
costingModule.lotsDesc1: Definition of different lots for incoming raw materials.
costingModule.lotsDesc2: Raw material issuance to work orders is done according to lots.
costingModule.lotsDesc3: Helps track poor raw materials and load responsibility on the supplier.
costingModule.lotsDesc4: Example: Cement from 3 suppliers → 3 lots for the same item.
costingModule.shiftsDesc2: Helps identify human errors when quality issues arise.
costingModule.shiftsDesc3: Multiple shift systems can be used (e.g., Ramadan shifts).
costingModule.productionDataDesc: In the production document, the following are recorded:
productionDataItems: Mixer counter before and after operation to calculate distance traveled
costingModule.productionEvaluationDesc1: Production document is evaluated at actual cost automatically.
costingModule.productionEvaluationDesc2: Raw materials under processing are reduced by automatic entries.
costingModule.productionEvaluationDesc3: Update is done directly when any cost element changes.
reportsItems: Production cost report for any time period showing: Production orders (start - end date), Production quantities, Total cost, Average unit cost, Totals by effort/content/stage/period.

Detailed production order cost list showing: Production quantity and cost by quality grades, Unit cost price, Raw material cost analysis, Industrial expenses, Expense analysis at any account level, Quantities used, their value, and average consumption per production unit.
costingModule.bomExampleTitle: BOM Example - Product: 1m³ Concrete Strength 350 Content 450
costingModule.salesTrackingDesc1: Sales orders are recorded before production orders.
costingModule.salesTrackingDesc3: Display showing each production movement and each sales transaction made on the sales order.

manufacturingModule.title: Costing & Manufacturing System
manufacturingModule.subtitle: Absolute Control and Utmost Accuracy in Actual Production Management
manufacturingModule.desc: ActiveSoft ERP system relies on a work-order approach supported by stages, lots, and shifts to manage industrial operations, ensuring the calculation of true production costs based on Actual Costing methodology without any arbitrary estimates.
manufacturingModule.section1Title: 1. Pillars of Monthly Actual Cost Formation
manufacturingModule.section1Desc: The system calculates the actual cost of products at the end of the production month with 100% accuracy by integrating the following elements:

section1Items.title: Material Costs
section1Items.desc: Accurate and direct calculation of all raw materials consumed.

section1Items.title: Direct Industrial Expenses
section1Items.desc: Charged immediately to production lines, either through direct journal entries or as materials issued from warehouses to the lines.

section1Items.title: Indirect Industrial Expenses
section1Items.desc: Recorded on cost centers for public or productive services. Distributed (fully or partially) to production lines based on monthly distribution ratios determining each line's benefit from each service center, automatically integrated into final production costs.

manufacturingModule.section2Title: 2. AI in Material Issuance and Inventory Processing (BOM)

section2Items.title: Automated BOM Issuance
section2Items.desc: The Bill of Materials is pre-defined to determine raw material ratios per product unit, automatically issuing materials based on it.

section2Items.title: Laboratory (Manual) Issuance
section2Items.desc: Allows manual issuance of variable materials based on lab instructions and quality controls.

section2Items.title: Absorbing Physical Inventory Differences
section2Items.desc: At month-end, upon entering actual inventory balances, the system automatically adjusts automated issuance documents to absorb inventory differences (surplus or shortage) and distributes them fairly across all relevant production orders to load true costs.

manufacturingModule.section3Title: 3. Tracking Inspection, Quality, and WIP Valuation

section3Items.title: Quality Cost Management
section3Items.desc: When part of production is sent for inspection, its cost is charged to inspection and quality expenses. If returned, the system automatically reduces the quality expense.

section3Items.title: Automated Reduction Entries
section3Items.desc: Upon issuing the production document and evaluating it at actual cost, the system automatically generates an accounting entry reducing the WIP account without human intervention.

section3Items.title: Multi-period Production Orders
section3Items.desc: Supports orders spanning multiple financial periods. If produced previously at a different cost, the system intelligently requests reopening those periods to update them.

manufacturingModule.section4Title: 4. Fair Distribution of Expenses (Weighted Time Quantity)
manufacturingModule.section4Desc: The default is distributing industrial expenses based on production order runtime. However, since most factories don't log runtimes accurately, ActiveSoft provides innovative alternatives:
section4Items: Adopting production quantity as an alternative to operating hours.
To ensure fairness, production quantity is weighted by the product's selling price, ensuring a balanced and logical distribution of industrial expenses.
manufacturingModule.section5Title: 5. 3D Tracking System: Stages, Lots, and Shifts

section5Items.title: First: Multi-Stage Costing
section5Items.desc: Supports sequential processing for products passing through multiple stages. The system calculates the first stage cost, then re-evaluates it as input material for the second stage automatically.

section5Items.title: Second: Lot Tracking & Suppliers
section5Items.desc: Link incoming materials to a specific 'Lot' and issue them by the same lot to work orders. If defects appear in the final product, you can accurately track the lot used to identify the responsible supplier.

section5Items.title: Third: Shift Management
section5Items.desc: Link production to specific shifts. In case of a manufacturing defect caused by a human factor, you can identify the responsible shift immediately. Provides full flexibility to create custom shift systems.

manufacturingModule.section6Title: 6. Exclusive Competitive Advantage: Ready-Mix Concrete Logistics
manufacturingModule.section6Desc: The production document in ActiveSoft isn't just for financial calculations; it turns into an integrated logistical tool that accurately records:

section6Items.title: Identifying Participating Assets
section6Items.desc: Mixer, pump, loader, plant, and driver.

section6Items.title: Silo Tracking
section6Items.desc: Identify the exact silo from which cement was issued.

section6Items.title: Efficiency & Distance Calculation
section6Items.desc: Record departure/return times, and mixer odometer before and after trips to accurately calculate delivery distance and include it in cost analytics.

inventoryModule.title: Inventory Management
inventoryModule.subtitle: Comprehensive inventory management system with advanced tracking and valuation capabilities
inventoryModule.structureAdditional: Additional flexible classification based on business activity that does not affect coding
inventoryModule.structureLots: Dividing a single item into multiple lots
lotsFunctionsItems: Track raw material source and identify supplier in case of defects
Manage orders that depend on a specific supplier or batch
inventoryModule.itemAttributesReports: Ability to display inventory reports based on any of these attributes
inventoryModule.warehousesDesc: Warehouse classification by type (raw materials - finished products - work in progress - spare parts)
inventoryModule.warehousesLocations: Internal division into storage locations within each warehouse
inventoryModule.reorderDesc2: System automatically identifies items that need to be reordered
inventorySystemItems: Inventory differences are processed accounting-wise in documents and warehouses
inventoryModule.qualityTestsDesc1: Quality testing available for finished products or purchases
inventoryModule.qualityTestsDesc2: Support for testing at any stage of production
inventoryDocsItems: Sales issues - Production issues - Cost center issues
Any documents specific to business activity
inventoryModule.inventoryDocsAccountingTitle: All documents automatically generate accounting entries including:
inventoryModule.valuationDesc2: Valuation of new purchases directly affects inventory cost
inventoryModule.productionIssueDesc1: Automatic issuance of raw materials according to product BOM
productionIssueItems: Differences are automatically accommodated in all issue documents
Difference distribution on production orders with precise ratio
inventoryModule.basicAccountsTitle: Basic Accounts Required to Define a Product Group
inventoryModule.basicAccountsDesc: The following accounts must be defined before using the group:

details: Debit side for additions and credit side for issues
Debit for inventory shortages and credit for surpluses
For issuing items to cost centers
For issuing raw materials to production orders

inventoryModule.basicAccountsNote: Without these accounts, inventory documents cannot be recorded
inventoryModule.reportExamplesTitle: Examples of Reports Supported by the System
reportExamplesProductionItems: Production cost report during a period
Cost of raw materials for orders + absorbed expenses
Production order movement (quantity - raw material cost - stage cost - unit cost)
Average unit cost for each order
reportExamplesCostCentersItems: Analysis of what was issued from raw materials to each cost center

pos.title: Point of Sale (POS) System
pos.desc: Fast and reliable retail solution integrated with your central ERP for seamless multi-branch management.
pos.modernizeDesc: Our POS system is built for speed and accuracy. Whether you have a single store or a nationwide chain, our solution scales with your growth.

features.fastCheckoutDesc: Optimized interface for quick sales processing in busy environments.
features.multiBranchSyncDesc: Real-time synchronization between branches and the central warehouse.
features.paymentMethodsDesc: Full support for cash, credit, and digital payment systems.
features.hardwareSupportDesc: Seamless integration with barcode scanners, receipt printers, and cash drawers.
features.userPermissionsDesc: Secure access levels for cashiers, supervisors, and branch managers.
features.salesAnalyticsDesc: Instant reporting on daily sales, profit margins, and inventory movement.

smartScale.title: Smart Weighing System
smartScale.desc: An advanced electronic/mechanical system that links sensory equipment (such as Load Cells) with integrated software, allowing the weighing process to be performed automatically, and data is recorded directly on the accounting system or ERP without significant human intervention.

components.item1: High-precision Load Cells that weigh quantities in various types of vessels, vehicles, or boxes.
components.item2: Controller / Indicator that receives weight signals from the cells and converts them into data.
components.item3: Internet or internal network connection to send data to a central platform or accounting software.
components.item4: ERP software or accounting system that receives data directly to update inventory, invoices, and performance analysis.
components.item5: Dashboard screen or mobile app to display weights and real-time reports.
components.item6: Calibration mechanisms to ensure weight accuracy, especially with changes in temperature, humidity, or operating conditions.

smartScale.benefitsTitle: Benefits of Using Smart Scales in Packing / Export Stations

benefit1.title: Increased Accuracy and Reduced Errors
benefit1.desc: Weight is recorded automatically, meaning no manual entry errors or incorrect recording, thus the calculation of cost and return is more accurate.

benefit2.title: Reducing Waste and Loss
benefit2.desc: When you can determine the product weight before and after packing, you discover waste and take measures to improve it and save resources.

benefit3.title: Speeding Up Operations
benefit3.desc: Weight is taken directly, inventory is updated, invoices are issued, and you won't have to stop work for manual recording.

benefit4.title: Transparency and Credibility Before Customers and Customs
benefit4.desc: Documented weight data helps maintain a consistent record, whether for the buyer, export, or auditing.

benefit5.title: Improved Decision Making
benefit5.desc: Real-time weight reports and aggregated data help managers see packing performance, monitor performance, and plan for business expansion or improvement.

benefit6.title: Lower Cost in the Long Run
benefit6.desc: Although the initial investment may be high, the savings in labor, losses, time, and waste make the return on it large over time.

exportModule.title: Export Stations Management System
exportModule.subtitle: An integrated solution for managing export operations efficiently and accurately
exportModule.desc: An advanced system specifically designed to manage all aspects of export operations, from document preparation to customs clearance and shipping management.
features: Comprehensive management of export operations from start to finish
Integrated system for managing documents required for export
Tracking customs clearance operations and automated alerts
Effective system for shipping and international transport management
Tracking the quality of products prepared for export
Detailed reports for export operations and financial analytics
exportModule.mainFeaturesDesc: Our system provides an integrated set of tools to manage export operations with high efficiency and absolute accuracy.

mainFeatures.title: Document Management
mainFeatures.desc: Manage and track all documents required for export including commercial invoices, certificates of origin, and inspection certificates.

mainFeatures.title: Customs Clearance
mainFeatures.desc: An integrated system to manage customs clearance procedures with shipment status tracking and alerts for required documents.

mainFeatures.title: Shipping Management
mainFeatures.desc: Track international shipments and manage shipping lines and schedules with integration with global shipping companies.

mainFeatures.title: Quality Control
mainFeatures.desc: An advanced system for monitoring the quality of products prepared for export with the ability to issue quality and inspection certificates.

mainFeatures.title: Financial Management
mainFeatures.desc: Manage all financial aspects of export operations including product pricing, foreign currencies, and collections.

mainFeatures.title: Reports and Analytics
mainFeatures.desc: Detailed reports on export operations with performance analytics and KPIs to make informed decisions.

Equivalent value in Egyptian pounds according to the exchange rate recorded in the system
exportModule.costBreakdownDesc: The system clearly displays the cost breakdown into:

concreteManagement.title: Concrete Management System
concreteManagement.subtitle: Complete Solution for Ready-Mix Concrete Plants
concreteManagement.description: An integrated system to manage all operations of ready-mix concrete plants with high accuracy and complete flexibility.
features: Multi-plant operations with ability to transfer vehicles (cost centers) between branches
Complete tracking of production process from raw materials entry to concrete preparation
Automatic inventory alerts to prevent production interruption
Quality control linking final product to raw materials with ability to modify components during production
Direct sales capability with one-step manufacturing and daily invoice issuance
Comprehensive reports for production operations matching with laboratory reports

cards.title: Customers and Sales
cards.description: Complete management of customer accounts, sales orders, and invoices with detailed reporting

cards.title: Fixed Assets
cards.description: Tracking and management of all fixed assets with depreciation calculations

cards.title: Inventory and Warehouses
cards.description: Comprehensive inventory management with real-time tracking across multiple warehouses

cards.title: Receipt Papers
cards.description: Automatic entry creation from receipt papers between customer and establishment with all accounting movements

cards.title: Payment Papers
cards.description: Complete management of payment operations including payment and return with automatic accounting entries

cards.title: Customer Accounts
cards.description: Entry of receipts (cash or check) with detailed reports to track customer accounts

cards.title: Supplier Accounts
cards.description: Monitoring of supplier accounts and extraction of account statements

cards.title: General Accounts
cards.description: Chart of accounts with unlimited levels and daily entries automatically created from different system modules

cards.title: Treasuries and Banks
cards.description: Definition of multiple treasuries and documentation of receipt and payment operations

concreteManagement.financialMovementsDescription: Provides you with many vouchers such as receipt vouchers and their details, voucher number, receipt number, entry number and its analytical, as well as payment vouchers and linking them to accounts and due date. The program also allows you to code the movements of collections from customers and payments to suppliers and code the representative responsible for that, whether this movement is cash, check, transfer, network, or direct collector and all required data in the type of movement and automatic collection of due checks.
concreteManagement.transferDescription: Ease of transfer and settlements, the program enables you to transfer from warehouse to warehouse as well as transfer request, settlement of disbursement and addition and losses, visa settlement, settlement of sales checks, disbursement and addition permissions and their returns.
concreteManagement.productionDescription: Define concrete equations according to different efforts, and upon creating an order, the program automatically performs the production process.
concreteManagement.hrDescription: Through it, a database for employees is created, different jobs are defined, and employee documents are attached.
concreteManagement.suppliersDescription: Purchase orders and supply orders are created, purchase invoices are made, and a database for suppliers is created with all their data.
concreteManagement.accountingDescription: Enables you to post to accounts and sub-centers a group of entries under certain conditions and the ability to renumber daily entries.
concreteManagement.itemsDescription: The program allows you to manage warehouses, stores, and items through comprehensive data for items: name, code, alternative codes for the item, alternative items, carton barcode, measurement units for items, coding items in groups, and whether the item is normal or a mixture. If it's a mixture, what are the raw materials involved in its composition, and when assembling the mixture, the program automatically deducts from the raw materials according to their percentage in the mixture composition. Ability to add a service to the item and a price for each service (delivery service for example), add images to items and coding in more than one store with different prices, types of item services and the commission on them, item grouping.
concreteManagement.keyFeaturesDescription: Integrated system to manage all operations of ready-mix concrete plants with high accuracy and complete flexibility
concreteManagement.multiPlantDescription: Multi-plant management with ability to transfer vehicles (cost centers) between branches
concreteManagement.productionTrackingDescription: Complete tracking of production process from raw materials entry to concrete preparation
concreteManagement.inventoryAlertsDescription: Automatic alerts for raw material inventory quantities to prevent production interruption
concreteManagement.qualityControlDescription: Linking final product to raw materials with ability to modify components during production
concreteManagement.directSalesDescription: Direct sales capability with one-step manufacturing and daily invoice issuance
concreteManagement.detailedReportingDescription: Comprehensive reports for production operations matching with laboratory reports
concreteManagement.financialManagementDescription: Integrated accounting system covering all financial aspects of managing ready-mix concrete plants
concreteManagement.costCentersDescription: Calculation of cost and revenue for vehicles, mixers, and pumps (cost centers) to determine detailed profit and loss
concreteManagement.detailedFinancialReportsDescription: Ability to extract income statement and balance sheet for each separate branch and consolidated company extracts
concreteManagement.compoundTaxInvoicesDescription: Ability to create invoices with compound tax at invoice level and item level
concreteManagement.costManagementDescription: Creation of unlimited direct and indirect costs, linking them to products, with fair distribution of indirect costs
concreteManagement.financialMovementsDescription2: Receipt and payment vouchers linked to accounts and due dates, coding collections from customers and payments to suppliers movements
concreteManagement.transfersAndSettlementsDescription: Easy transfer and settlements from warehouse to warehouse, disbursement and addition settlements, visa settlements, and sales check settlements

accountingModule.title: Financial & Accounting System
accountingModule.subtitle: Accurate and comprehensive financial management with full control over accounts and assets
accountingModule.desc: The ActiveSoft ERP accounting system provides a wide range of advanced tools to manage general accounts, treasury, banks, checks, and fixed assets, with detailed financial reports to support decision making.

generalAccounts.title: First: General Accounts

features.title: Chart of Accounts
features.desc: Consists of four levels, allowing accurate identification of the balance sheet item for each account.

features.title: Multi-Currency
features.desc: Ability to set the exchange rate for any period based on transaction date, with the option to adjust the rate to the actual rate for each transaction individually.

features.title: Journal Entries
features.desc: Record unlimited journal entries with independent notes for each item. Supports different currencies and splitting entries.

features.title: Consolidated Accounts
features.desc: Merge any number of chart of accounts items to track a combined matter in a unified statement.

features.title: Withholding & Addition Taxes
features.desc: Automatically direct the tax entry when added to purchase, sales, or return transactions.

features.title: Auto-Closing
features.desc: Enable automatic closing entry for expenses and revenues.

features.title: Financial Years
features.desc: Work across multiple years without programming intervention, with automatic balance carry-forward.

features.title: Sales Plan
features.desc: Link the sales plan with collections for marketing reps to extract achievement rates and measure efficiency.

features.title: Account Suspension & Restriction
features.desc: Suspend work on any account or restrict its use in journal entries to limit impact to actual movements only.

features.title: Unified Customer/Supplier Codes
features.desc: Allow defining a customer with the same code as their supplier account, and vice versa.

features.title: Data Confidentiality
features.desc: Allocate specific accounts to appear in reports only for specific employees to ensure data confidentiality.

reports: Balance Sheet and Income Statement for any period
Multiple trial balance and account statement reports
Supplier or Customer balances according to aging
Sales plan and collection tracking reports

treasury.title: Second: Treasury
features: Add an infinite number of treasuries.
Link each treasury to an employee and a chart of accounts item (creditor for disbursement, debtor for collection).
Record collection and disbursement documents with independent notes for each item.

banksAndChecks.title: Third: Banks & Checks

features.title: Bank Definition
features.desc: Define an unlimited number of banks to open accounts in.

features.title: Accounting Link
features.desc: Define a movement account, a notes receivable account, and a notes payable account for each bank account.

features.title: Checkbooks
features.desc: Record checkbook data for each account by specifying the start and end of the serial number.

movements: Issued checks: Issuance, payment, return, and cancellation.
Received checks: Receipt, deposit, collection, return, and return to debtor.
Other bank movements: Incoming/outgoing transfers, debit/credit advices.
reports: Notes receivable check reports (under collection, collected, returned).

fixedAssets.title: Fourth: Fixed Assets
features: Record asset data within specific groups with an annual depreciation rate.
List assets by their account code within each group.
Automatically issue a depreciation entry monthly with a single click.
Specify asset, expense, and accumulated depreciation accounts in the chart.
Record cost centers, start of operation date, and scrap value.
reports: Depreciation entry report by asset groups or cost centers.
Asset value report up to a specific date.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our services and processes.

questions.q: What is Oracle ERP and how can it benefit my business?
questions.a: Oracle ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) is a suite of integrated business management applications. It helps automate and streamline your core processes like finance, HR, manufacturing, and supply chain, leading to increased efficiency, better decision-making, and reduced operational costs.

questions.q: How long does a typical custom software project take?
questions.a: Project timelines vary depending on the complexity and scope of the application. A small project might take a few weeks, while a large-scale enterprise system can take several months. We provide a detailed project timeline after our initial consultation and analysis phase.

questions.q: Is your pricing fixed or do you offer custom quotes?
questions.a: While we have starting prices for common service packages, most of our projects are custom-quoted. This ensures you only pay for what you need. We provide a detailed, transparent proposal after thoroughly understanding your requirements.

questions.q: What kind of support do you offer after a project is completed?
questions.a: We offer various post-launch support and maintenance packages. This includes technical support, bug fixes, security updates, and options for ongoing feature enhancements to ensure your application remains effective and up-to-date.

questions.q: Do you work with international clients?
questions.a: Yes, absolutely. While we are based in Cairo, we have successfully delivered projects for clients across the globe. We leverage modern communication tools to ensure seamless collaboration regardless of your location.

questions.q: Do you provide training for the systems you implement?
questions.a: Yes, comprehensive user training is a core part of our implementation process. We ensure your team is fully equipped to use the system effectively and provide detailed documentation for ongoing reference.

questions.q: Can your systems integrate with hardware like electronic scales?
questions.a: Yes, we specialize in hardware integration. Our systems can connect directly with industrial scales, scanners, and other IoT devices to automate data collection and eliminate manual entry errors.

questions.q: Do you specialize in any specific industries?
questions.a: While our Oracle ERP solutions are versatile, we have deep expertise in Manufacturing, Agricultural Export, Ready-Mix Concrete, and Financial Services, with tailored modules for each sector.

exportModule.title: Export Management System
exportModule.subtitle: Comprehensive export management system with detailed shipment tracking and financial analysis
exportModule.shipmentTrackingDesc: The system displays detailed information for each shipment, including:
shipmentTrackingItems: Lot No. associated with raw materials or products
financialValuesItems: Shipment value in the client's foreign currency
Equivalent value in Egyptian pounds according to the exchange rate recorded in the system
exportModule.costBreakdownDesc: The system clearly displays the cost breakdown into:
costBreakdownItems: Raw material costs (raw materials - packaging materials - auxiliary materials)
exportModule.actualExpensesDesc: Monitor all expenses associated with each shipment, including:
actualExpensesItems: Raw material supply invoices for the shipment
exportModule.internalCostBreakdown: Internal cost breakdown into main elements with precision
collectionsDiscountsItems: Discount granted to the client (if any)
Collections: Collection percentage, amount collected, cash payment dates
Net invoice after collections: (Invoice value - Discount - Collected payments)
Remaining balance on the client for their transactions with the company: Total invoices, Total collections, Total discounts
exportModule.archiveDesc1: Save all shipment data in a complete electronic file
exportModule.archiveDesc2: Maintain a special archive for documents:
exportModule.archiveBenefit: This facilitates reference for any review or accounting reconciliation
exportModule.shipmentItemsDesc: Divide the shipment into items according to:
shipmentItemsItems: Number of units inside each pallet
exportModule.expenseDistribution: The system uses this data to distribute general expenses (shipping - preparation - clearance):
exportModule.distributionMethod: The system distributes expenses according to the number of pallets as a percentage of total monthly operations

costingModule.title: Costing Module
costingModule.subtitle: Comprehensive production cost management system with actual costing methodology
costingModule.methodologyDesc: The system is based on Actual Costing during the production month.
costingModule.bomTitle: Raw Materials and BOM (Bill of Materials)
costingModule.bomDesc1: Material ratios for each product are determined through BOM.
costingModule.bomDesc2: The system automatically issues raw material documents according to BOM ratios.
costingModule.bomDesc3: Variable materials are manually issued based on workshop instructions.
costingModule.bomDesc4: When entering actual inventory at the end of the month:
costingModule.qualityDesc1: A portion of production is issued for inspection and loaded to Quality Inspection cost.
costingModule.qualityDesc2: Quantity can be returned for inspection or to the warehouse, resulting in automatic reduction of quality expense.

inventoryModule.structureAdditional: Additional flexible classification based on business activity that does not affect coding
inventoryModule.structureLots: Dividing a single item into multiple lots
inventoryModule.itemAttributesReports: Ability to display inventory reports based on any of these attributes

concreteManagement_legacy.title: Ready-Mix Concrete Plant Management System
concreteManagement_legacy.subtitle: A complete system for controlling, monitoring, and managing ready-mix concrete plants
concreteManagement_legacy.description: A comprehensive, interconnected accounting software with extreme precision and flexibility, specifically designed to meet the requirements of ready-mix concrete plants of all types, whether in terms of content or concrete effort. It also allows quality control and manufacturing monitoring, as well as knowledge of silos, mixers, and pumps, defining the production equation for each type of concrete, defining customer sites, creating orders, with the ability to issue daily invoices.
concreteManagement_legacy.featuresTitle: Features of Ready-Mix Concrete Plant Management Software
features: Work on multiple plants simultaneously with the ability to move vehicles (cost centers) between plants (branches).
Track the concrete production process from the entry of raw materials to the preparation and manufacturing of concrete.
Automatic alerts for inventory quantities of raw materials.
Link finished products to raw materials with the ability to change one component during production in case of quantity depletion or replacement of one item with another.
Ability to manufacture for direct sales - produce quantities and sell them directly to the customer in one step.
Detailed reports for production operations and matching them with laboratory reports.
Ability to create invoices with compound tax at the invoice level and at the item level.
Calculate cost and revenue of vehicles, mixers, and pumps (cost centers) to know detailed loss and profit.
Ability to extract income statement and balance sheet for each branch separately.
Ability to extract income statement and balance sheet for the company as a whole.
Create an unlimited number of direct and indirect costs and link them to the product (ready-mix concrete).
Fair and accurate distribution of indirect costs and calculating the product cost as accurately as possible (automatically).

cards.title: Customers and Sales
cards.description: Can link customers to representatives, define mixers and pumps, then create orders for customers

cards.title: Fixed Assets
cards.description: Define fixed assets, determine depreciation installments, and enter depreciation entries between expenses and depreciation provisions

cards.title: Inventory and Warehouses
cards.description: Define inventory accounts whether cement silos or sand warehouses and perform all inventory movements

cards.title: Receipt Papers
cards.description: Create automatic entry as a result of receiving a receipt paper between the customer and the establishment and perform all accounting movements

cards.title: Payment Papers
cards.description: Perform all movements related to payment papers such as (payment - return) and automatically creates accounting entries

cards.title: Customer Accounts and Receipts
cards.description: Enter receipts whether cash or check, with many detailed reports to track customer accounts

cards.title: Supplier Accounts and Payments
cards.description: Monitor supplier accounts and extract their account statements

cards.title: General Accounts
cards.description: Chart of accounts with unlimited levels and daily entries that are automatically created from different parts of the system

cards.title: Treasuries and Banks
cards.description: Define more than one treasury and document receipt and payment operations from the treasury

concreteManagement_legacy.financialMovementsDescription: Provides you with many vouchers such as receipt vouchers and their details, voucher number, receipt number, entry number and its analytical, as well as payment vouchers and linking them to accounts and due date. The program also allows you to code the movements of collections from customers and payments to suppliers and code the representative responsible for that, whether this movement is cash, check, transfer, network, or direct collector and all required data in the type of movement and automatic collection of due checks.
concreteManagement_legacy.transferDescription: Ease of transfer and settlements, the program enables you to transfer from warehouse to warehouse as well as transfer request, settlement of disbursement and addition and losses, visa settlement, settlement of sales checks, disbursement and addition permissions and their returns.
concreteManagement_legacy.productionDescription: Define concrete equations according to different efforts, and upon creating an order, the program automatically performs the production process.
concreteManagement_legacy.hrDescription: Through it, a database for employees is created, different jobs are defined, and employee documents are attached.
concreteManagement_legacy.suppliersDescription: Purchase orders and supply orders are created, purchase invoices are made, and a database for suppliers is created with all their data.
concreteManagement_legacy.accountingDescription: Enables you to post to accounts and sub-centers a group of entries under certain conditions and the ability to renumber daily entries.
concreteManagement_legacy.itemsDescription: The program allows you to manage warehouses, stores, and items through comprehensive data for items: name, code, alternative codes for the item, alternative items, carton barcode, measurement units for items, coding items in groups, and whether the item is normal or a mixture. If it's a mixture, what are the raw materials involved in its composition, and when assembling the mixture, the program automatically deducts from the raw materials according to their percentage in the mixture composition. Ability to add a service to the item and a price for each service (delivery service for example), add images to items and coding in more than one store with different prices, types of item services and the commission on them, item grouping.

concreteManagement.title: Concrete Management System
concreteManagement.subtitle: Complete Solution for Ready-Mix Concrete Plants
concreteManagement.description: An integrated system to manage all operations of ready-mix concrete plants with high accuracy and complete flexibility.
features: Multi-plant operations with ability to transfer vehicles (cost centers) between branches
Complete tracking of production process from raw materials entry to concrete preparation
Automatic inventory alerts to prevent production interruption
Quality control linking final product to raw materials with ability to modify components during production
Direct sales capability with one-step manufacturing and daily invoice issuance
Comprehensive reports for production operations matching with laboratory reports

cards.title: Customers and Sales
cards.description: Complete management of customer accounts, sales orders, and invoices with detailed reporting

cards.title: Fixed Assets
cards.description: Tracking and management of all fixed assets with depreciation calculations

cards.title: Inventory and Warehouses
cards.description: Comprehensive inventory management with real-time tracking across multiple warehouses

cards.title: Receipt Papers
cards.description: Automatic entry creation from receipt papers between customer and establishment with all accounting movements

cards.title: Payment Papers
cards.description: Complete management of payment operations including payment and return with automatic accounting entries

cards.title: Customer Accounts
cards.description: Entry of receipts (cash or check) with detailed reports to track customer accounts

cards.title: Supplier Accounts
cards.description: Monitoring of supplier accounts and extraction of account statements

cards.title: General Accounts
cards.description: Chart of accounts with unlimited levels and daily entries automatically created from different system modules

cards.title: Treasuries and Banks
cards.description: Definition of multiple treasuries and documentation of receipt and payment operations

concreteManagement.financialMovementsDescription: Provides you with many vouchers such as receipt vouchers and their details, voucher number, receipt number, entry number and its analytical, as well as payment vouchers and linking them to accounts and due date. The program also allows you to code the movements of collections from customers and payments to suppliers and code the representative responsible for that, whether this movement is cash, check, transfer, network, or direct collector and all required data in the type of movement and automatic collection of due checks.
concreteManagement.transferDescription: Ease of transfer and settlements, the program enables you to transfer from warehouse to warehouse as well as transfer request, settlement of disbursement and addition and losses, visa settlement, settlement of sales checks, disbursement and addition permissions and their returns.
concreteManagement.productionDescription: Define concrete equations according to different efforts, and upon creating an order, the program automatically performs the production process.
concreteManagement.hrDescription: Through it, a database for employees is created, different jobs are defined, and employee documents are attached.
concreteManagement.suppliersDescription: Purchase orders and supply orders are created, purchase invoices are made, and a database for suppliers is created with all their data.
concreteManagement.accountingDescription: Enables you to post to accounts and sub-centers a group of entries under certain conditions and the ability to renumber daily entries.
concreteManagement.itemsDescription: The program allows you to manage warehouses, stores, and items through comprehensive data for items: name, code, alternative codes for the item, alternative items, carton barcode, measurement units for items, coding items in groups, and whether the item is normal or a mixture. If it's a mixture, what are the raw materials involved in its composition, and when assembling the mixture, the program automatically deducts from the raw materials according to their percentage in the mixture composition. Ability to add a service to the item and a price for each service (delivery service for example), add images to items and coding in more than one store with different prices, types of item services and the commission on them, item grouping.
concreteManagement.keyFeaturesDescription: Integrated system to manage all operations of ready-mix concrete plants with high accuracy and complete flexibility
concreteManagement.multiPlantDescription: Multi-plant management with ability to transfer vehicles (cost centers) between branches
concreteManagement.productionTrackingDescription: Complete tracking of production process from raw materials entry to concrete preparation
concreteManagement.inventoryAlertsDescription: Automatic alerts for raw material inventory quantities to prevent production interruption
concreteManagement.qualityControlDescription: Linking final product to raw materials with ability to modify components during production
concreteManagement.directSalesDescription: Direct sales capability with one-step manufacturing and daily invoice issuance
concreteManagement.detailedReportingDescription: Comprehensive reports for production operations matching with laboratory reports
concreteManagement.financialManagementDescription: Integrated accounting system covering all financial aspects of managing ready-mix concrete plants
concreteManagement.costCentersDescription: Calculation of cost and revenue for vehicles, mixers, and pumps (cost centers) to determine detailed profit and loss
concreteManagement.detailedFinancialReportsDescription: Ability to extract income statement and balance sheet for each separate branch and consolidated company extracts
concreteManagement.compoundTaxInvoicesDescription: Ability to create invoices with compound tax at invoice level and item level
concreteManagement.costManagementDescription: Creation of unlimited direct and indirect costs, linking them to products, with fair distribution of indirect costs
concreteManagement.financialMovementsDescription2: Receipt and payment vouchers linked to accounts and due dates, coding collections from customers and payments to suppliers movements
concreteManagement.transfersAndSettlementsDescription: Easy transfer and settlements from warehouse to warehouse, disbursement and addition settlements, visa settlements, and sales check settlements
concreteManagement.ctaTitle: Interested in a ready-mix concrete plant management program?
concreteManagement.ctaDescription: Contact us today to learn more about how our program can help you manage your plant efficiently and accurately.
